title: chamaecrista harneyi
intro: Chamaecrista harneyi, also known as Harney's sensitive plant or sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and fighting against certain types of cancer. Chamaecrista harneyi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
